translations.en: I've been a listener for years.
translations.fr: Je suis auditrice depuis des années.
translations.vi: Tôi đã là thính giả nhiều năm rồi.
translations.hi: मैं कई सालों से श्रोता रही हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg har vært lytter i årevis.
translations.id: Saya sudah jadi pendengar selama bertahun-tahun.
translations.sv: Jag har varit lyssnare i flera år.
translations.ro: Sunt ascultătoare de ani de zile.
translations.da: Jeg har været lytter i årevis.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite 1st person singular present of the copula 'sein'; links subject to predicate nominal.
Preposition governing dative; marks temporal duration starting point ('since/for').
Plural dative noun governed by 'seit'; part of the prepositional phrase 'seit Jahren'.
Predicate nominal (subject complement) with the copula; feminine singular, no article.

sentences.target: Die Hörerin ruft wegen der Sendung an.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈhøːʁəʁɪn ʁuːft ˈveːgən deːɐ̯ ˈzɛndʊŋ an/

translations.de: Die Hörerin ruft wegen der Sendung an.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈhøːʁəʁɪn ʁuːft ˈveːgən deːɐ̯ ˈzɛndʊŋ an/
translations.en: The listener calls because of the show.
translations.es: La oyente llama por el programa.
translations.fr: L'auditrice appelle à propos de l'émission.
translations.zh-Hans: 女听众因为节目打来电话。
translations.yue: 女聽眾因為節目打來電話。
translations.pt: A ouvinte liga por causa do programa.
translations.vi: Nữ thính giả gọi về chương trình.
translations.nl: De luisteraar belt over het programma.
translations.hu: A hallgatónő a műsor miatt telefonál.
translations.hi: महिला श्रोता कार्यक्रम के बारे में फोन करती है.
translations.el: Η ακροάτρια καλεί για την εκπομπή.
translations.id: Pendengar perempuan menelepon soal acara itu.
translations.ro: Ascultătoarea sună în legătură me emisiunea.
translations.ja: 女性リスナーが番組の件で電話している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Hörerin' (subject NP).
Noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite 3rd person singular present of the separable verb 'anrufen' (main verb); its particle appears clause-finally.
Preposition typically governing genitive; introduces a causal PP.
Definite article, feminine genitive singular (matching 'Sendung') within the PP 'wegen der Sendung'.
Noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'wegen' (genitive).
Separable verbal particle forming 'anrufen'; moved to clause-final position; linked to 'ruft' via compound_id.

sentences.target: Als Hörerin merke ich den Unterschied sofort.
sentences.reading: /als ˈhøːʁəʁɪn ˈmɛʁkə ɪç deːn ˈʊntɐʃiːt zoˈfɔʁt/

translations.de: Als Hörerin merke ich den Unterschied sofort.
translations.ipa: /als ˈhøːʁəʁɪn ˈmɛʁkə ɪç deːn ˈʊntɐʃiːt zoˈfɔʁt/
translations.en: As a listener, I notice the difference right away.
translations.es: Como oyente, noto la diferencia al instante.
translations.fr: En tant qu'auditrice, je remarque tout de suite la différence.
translations.it: Da ascoltatrice, noto subito la differenza.
translations.zh-Hans: 作为听众，我马上就能察觉到区别。
translations.yue: 作為聽眾，我即刻就察覺到分別。
translations.ru: Как слушательница, я сразу замечаю разницу.
translations.pt: Como ouvinte, noto a diferença na hora.
translations.tr: Bir dinleyici olarak farkı hemen anlarım.
translations.vi: Là người nghe, tôi nhận ra sự khác biệt ngay.
translations.nl: Als luisteraar merk ik het verschil meteen.
translations.uk: Як слухачка, я одразу помічаю різницю.
translations.hi: एक श्रोता के रूप में, मैं अंतर तुरंत समझ जाती हूँ.
translations.pl: Jako słuchaczka od razu zauważam różnicę.
translations.el: Ως ακροάτρια, καταλαβαίνω αμέσως τη διαφορά.
translations.nb: Som lytter merker jeg forskjellen med en gang.
translations.id: Sebagai pendengar, saya langsung menyadari perbedaannya.
translations.sv: Som lyssnare märker jag skillnaden direkt.
translations.da: Som lytter lægger jeg straks mærke til forskellen.
translations.ja: リスナーとして、違いはすぐにわかります。

tokens.explanation: Prepositional marker of role/status ('as'); introduces the PP 'Als Hörerin' modifying the clause.
Noun complement to 'als'; feminine singular; forms a role PP.
Finite 1st person singular present; main verb of the clause.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'merke'.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object 'Unterschied'.
Noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'merke' (accusative).
Adverb of time; modifies the verb, indicating immediacy.

sentences.target: Meine Freundin ist heute Hörerin im Studio.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfrɔʏ̯ndɪn ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈhøːʁəʁɪn ɪm ˈʃtuːdi̯o/

translations.de: Meine Freundin ist heute Hörerin im Studio.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfrɔʏ̯ndɪn ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈhøːʁəʁɪn ɪm ˈʃtuːdi̯o/
translations.en: My girlfriend is a listener at the studio today.
translations.es: Hoy mi novia está de oyente en el estudio.
translations.fr: Ma petite amie est aujourd'hui auditrice en studio.
translations.it: La mia ragazza oggi è in studio come ascoltatrice.
translations.ko: 오늘 제 여자친구는 스튜디오에서 청취자로 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我女朋友今天在演播室当听众。
translations.yue: 我女朋友今日喺錄音室做聽眾。
translations.ru: Моя девушка сегодня в студии как слушательница.
translations.pt: Minha namorada está no estúdio hoje como ouvinte.
translations.vi: Bạn gái tôi hôm nay là thính giả tại phòng thu.
translations.nl: Mijn vriendin is vandaag luisteraar in de studio.
translations.uk: Моя дівчина сьогодні у студії як слухачка.
translations.hu: A barátnőm ma a stúdióban hallgató.
translations.hi: मेरी प्रेमिका आज स्टूडियो में श्रोता है.
translations.pl: Moja dziewczyna jest dziś słuchaczką w studiu.
translations.el: Η κοπέλα μου σήμερα είναι ακροάτρια στο στούντιο.
translations.nb: Kjæresten min er lytter i studio i dag.
translations.id: Pacarku hari ini jadi pendengar di studio.
translations.sv: Min flickvän är lyssnare i studion i dag.
translations.ro: Prietena mea este astăzi ascultătoare în studio.
translations.cs: Moje přítelkyně je dnes ve studiu jako posluchačka.
translations.da: Min kæreste er lytter i studiet i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は彼女がスタジオでリスナーです。
